steps.t: The enemy encampment of Bardh-dorám lies to the west of Stoke. Thane Ordlac wants you to proceed to Bardh-dorám.
Bardh-dorám lies to the west of Stoke. Thane Ordlac wants you to enter Bardh-dorám and locate the tents of the enemy leaders.
Ordlac is in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should return to Ordlac and tell him of your successes.
